comment.body: Morgen everyone. Thank you Alma for the script. I am trying diferent set-ups still. In terms of  timeframe i am using mostly small timeframe like 1, 5, 10, 15, 30 minutes and 1 hour. Length of MA between 7 and 9. So far used for execution purpose - for example i am bearish biased around 6000 ES therefore enter short on 1/5 min sell signal. Same applies for Alma’s level. Also want to test it on multiple timeframe like 5 min and 30’min and long or short when same signal on both timeframes.
